Clean and purify the pores in-depth

description: Beauty Formulas Tea Tree blemish gel helps target spots, blemishes and pore-clogging bacteria to give you a clean and radiant skin right away. It has soothing Witch Hazel extract along with cooling and refreshing menthol and Peppermint. This is a great gel to fight acne, blemishes and get a clean and spot-free skin.
